display_information.name: Rally
display_information.description: The volunteer coordination agent for nonprofits. Fills shifts, rescues dropouts, answers questions.
display_information.long_description: Rally turns your Slack workspace into a volunteer HQ. Coordinators ask in plain language ('I need 6 volunteers Saturday 9am, 2 with driver's licenses') and Rally matches your opt-in roster by skill, certification and availability, reaches out with one-tap Accept/Decline, tracks confirmations on a live status card, and automatically back-fills when someone cancels. Volunteers join by DMing Rally a short intake chat. Questions like 'where do I park?' get cited answers from your workspace history via Slack's Real-Time Search API. Shift hours flow into a grant-ready impact ledger, and everything is queryable from any MCP client.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Volunteer coordination agent: fill shifts, join the roster, ask logistics questions.

suggested_prompts.title: Fill a shift
suggested_prompts.message: I need 6 volunteers for the Saturday food drive, 9am-1pm at the warehouse. At least 2 with driver's licenses and 1 Spanish speaker.

suggested_prompts.title: Join the roster
suggested_prompts.message: I'd like to sign up as a volunteer.

suggested_prompts.title: Shift status
suggested_prompts.message: How's coverage looking for our upcoming shifts?

suggested_prompts.title: Ask a question
suggested_prompts.message: Where do I park at the warehouse?
